programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim must surrender to Bular and unlock the Killahead Bridge to save kidnapped Blinky and promises Claire that he will get her brother back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim yearns to save Claires brother Meanwhile Strickler takes a field trip to find help in his quest for power

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is nominated for Spring Fling King Meanwhile Strickler brings Angor Rot to Arcadia so the Troll assassin can meet his prey.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: After last season’s victory, Aja and Krel struggle to relocate Mothership back to their Arcadia Oaks neighborhood, but their task is complicated when Toby and Eli discover the Royals’ Akiridion secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Aja and Krel hitch a ride in Stuart’s old UFO on a mission to rescue Vex from a bounty hunter outpost on the Moon. Meanwhile, Zadra receives intel about Morando from a surprising new ally.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Paladins face the most epic battle yet

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Thunk babysits Sandy and new baby Cliff to prove his responsible. Cliff is a jerk and keeps getting Sandy in trouble/Gran worries that Thunk isn't tough enough to survive to adulthood because he likes to hang out with old people, so she puts him through a series of toughness tests.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When the adults come down with the sneezles, the kids (including Lerk and Womp) use the chance to create their own society ("you-topia") with no rules, but Eep and Thunk disagree on how to run it/Food is scarce and when a large egg is spotted on the hunting field, Grug, Eep, Snoot, Munk and Squawk call dibbs. It's decided that whoever is tough enough to be the last holding on, wins the food.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Luckys buttons are pushed when her seemingly perfect cousin Julian comes to visit but reveals himself to be a junior con man

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky takes part in a secret Miradero tradition a nighttime scavenger hunt

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: Garby and Click-Clack must rescue the Dinotruxafter they are tied down by a destructive tribe of Slamtools who made an evil deal with D-Structs

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Bands on the Run Casper and Jimmy form a rock band to compete in the Deedstown Battle of the Bands. Vote for Casper Mantha is angling to win the office of Class Rep, but Kibosh fancies having a fellow ghost in power.

programme.title: Casper's Scare School
programme.desc: Permission Impossible When Ra's parents refuse to let him go on the school camping trip, he sneaks away and gets lost in the Scary Woods with Casper and Mantha. What Possessed You? programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Rupert, Edward and Bill go camping. Rupert is excited at the idea of playing ‘explorers' but as darkness falls the friends are frightened by strange shadows and noises.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: Raggety is getting the wood tidy for the annual visit of the Spring Inspector. If it's not looking its best, Spring won't go ahead and Raggety needs help from Rupert and his friends

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a coin purse with kitty coins, it's Store Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy help out at all the different stores (Cakey's Bakery, Baby Box's Craft Emporium, Kitty Fairy's Flower Shoppe) to earn kitty coins and save up for a melodicat at the Grand Opening of DJ Catnip’s Music Store!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy and the Gabby Cats prepare for a sleepover in the Garden, they discover Pillow Cat has never been to a sleepover. They help her conquer her fears and enjoy her first sleepover.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When a litter of hedgehogs are temporarily relocated to the habitat, Alex, Marty, Melman, and Gloria become their “babysitters.” The mischievous hedgies quickly wreak total havoc in the habitat—and worse yet, Alex must sacrifice his plans to crash a photoshoot for the zoo’s pamphlet cover when the baby hedgies find the travel tunnels and sneak out for an urban adventure of their own! After an “Adventures in Babysitting”-style citywide hedgehog chase, our gang—with a newfound sense of responsibility—ultimately locates the hedgehogs and learn that babies can be a lot of work, but also a whole lot of fun. And Alex gets his dream pamphlet cover—surrounded by the adorable baby hedgies!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: It’s Kate’s birthday and everyone in the habitat has something amazing planned- but Melman’s worried that his homemade/hoof-made gift won’t measure up. programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When The Croods experience the first-ever sugar-rush, they're hooked on the delicious new food; Grug is labeled a zombie after taking the first nap.

programme.title: Michael Palin - Into Iraq 1
programme.desc: Michael Palin embarks on a 1000 mile adventure into Iraq, a country he has never been to before. He boards a train in the spectacular snow-capped mountains of Lake Hazar in eastern Turkey, the source of the river Tigris, which Michael will follow until he reaches the Persian Gulf on the southern most coast of Iraq.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul 1

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Body Cam (S5)
programme.desc: In Florida, a thief ambushes officers. In Wisconsin, a traffic stop becomes a manhunt. An officer must ram a suspect off the road, endangering her own life.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: In New Mexico, police chase a shooter who guns down an unarmed man. In Florida, police close in on an armed robber from the ground and air.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective (S4)
programme.desc: As small-town secrets unravel, Sheriff Mike Gormley uncovers a dangerous love triangle and a vengeful killer who is willing to risk his own blood for retribution.

programme.desc: Hot Snakes Media uncovers Benjaman Kyle's disturbing secrets, dark-web activity, erased files, and ties to the Burger Chef killings.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S3)
programme.desc: Cody battles the dangers of dehydration searching for water and fire-making tools, while Joe gears up for mortal combat with aggressive feral boars.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: A rare winter tornado outbreak tears through towns across Tennessee as dozens of eyewitnesses capture the devastating power of nature in real time.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: As an arctic blizzard wreaks havoc across Nome, Kris finds gold under the ice but fire erupts overhead. Shawn struggles to rescue his operation.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: On this ice season Judgement Day, Shawn pushes himself and his equipment to the edge.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: As the miners rush to solid ground before the ice vanishes, Mr. Gold outlasts the fleet to secure TOMCOD. Kris assembles a makeshift operation.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (Specials) (S9)
programme.desc: Shawn's legal woes could end his season before it begins. Kris receives a once in a lifetime deal. Vernon upgrades the Gold Ship. Emily calls on her ace in the hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Tensions erupt among the crews as miners battle to bring in big gold. From fistfights to meltdowns, these are the loudest moments when they clashed.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Ant finds a 1929 Austin 7, but it has brake issues, poor lights, and a surprise fault. Plus, the deadline to finish the house restoration looms.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Ed must wrestle the giant heirs of Genghis Khan to become a man. He takes part in the annual rite of passage festival, Naadam.

programme.title: General History Of China (S1)
programme.desc: "Silk Road" refers to the ancient overland commercial trade route that started in ancient China and connected Asia, Africa and Europe.

programme.title: Ed Stafford's Rite Of Passage (S1)
programme.desc: Ed endures the bullet-ant ceremony, the most painful thing this side of child birth. Also facing 24 hours of agony are Brazilian boys who do this 20 times to become men.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker fights to stop his gold slide, Rick makes a discovery that could end his Vegas Valley dreams, and Kevin scores big at Sphinx Cut.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight_S2 (S2)
programme.desc: With Kye in the lead, everyone is gunning for him. Meanwhile, Kailee gets into the Great 8 for the first time, but struggles with a last-minute engine issue.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: A seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink. To clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for lost gold on the top floor.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In Florida, dark tiger pythons were introduced from Asia as pets and now pose a threat to the ecosystem. Otto and Pascal track them down.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Joined by Jack Osbourne, Heather investigates the eerie ghost town of Vulture City, where Gold Rush-era spirits hint at a far older evil.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Wusong vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Iron Kung Fu Fist
programme.desc: Liang Kun is a skilled martial arts master who left the martial arts world to protect his lover. However, his disappearance leads to her tragic death and as Liang Kun finds a way to survive in the martial arts world, he fights back to avenge his lover’s death with the help of a beggar gang leader.

programme.title: Punish Evil
programme.desc: A shipment of newly issued currency is robbed by three armed robbers, prompting Detective Chang to investigate. Following new leads, he successfully takes down one of the robbers. Meanwhile, the other two plot to rob a gold factory amidst the chaos. With meticulous planning, Chang thwarts their scheme and brings them to justice.

programme.title: Iron Squad W

Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: The world is in chaos after the tree of life was burnt. Sun Wu Kong decides to return to the past to resurrect it, but his divine power is unstable after losing the golden hoop, and he must find his younger self to team up to find the power of time. As the six-eared Macaque Monkey also wants the power of time, they clash in a fierce battle…

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael is known for her delicious and flavourful pesto sauces of all varieties. She prepares a pesto alla trapanese, a Sicilian dish made with almonds and tomatoes.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Follow Jason Wang and learn about the White Snow Osmanthus Crab, a classic Taiwanese dish that marries theatricality with oceanic umami. Master Chef Kuo Hong-che demonstrates how it is made.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Join Jason Wang to explore the Pagoda of Once Cut Pork, a renowned Taiwanese dish where Chef Hong Ming skillfully carves pork belly into a delectable, melt-in-your-mouth “pagoda” with precision knife work.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes of Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits as Theresa invites viewers to peek behind the curtain of her gift, being on tour, as well as surprising clients and never-before-seen readings.

programme.title: Taken in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sébastien Martin and his friend Chef François Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back. Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Top 20 chefs enter the kitchen for first challenge. Each contestant is tasked with creating a state fair inspired dish. Whoever wins the challenge grants the rest of their region immunity from going home.

programme.title: Couples Retreat Murder
programme.desc: Trying to save their marriage, Becky and Jim head to a couple's retreat which just so happens to include Becky's ex. Things only get worse when one of the guests goes missing and their host is found dead.

programme.title: Taken in Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard and his team try to make the grade when they partner with Bre, a college professor and aspiring flipper, to revive a rundown farmhouse in his old neighbourhood.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Secrets in the Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece kicks off this incredible meal with crispy purple yam jojos, inspired by the Pacific Northwest. Coated in oil and a seasoned flour mixture, they’re baked to perfection.

programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael honours her beloved grandfather by making his recipe for stuffed artichokes. She also prepares Roman-style artichokes, infused with fresh herbs and garlic and then sautéed in oil.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany

programme.desc: Derek gets a new property for $.50 on the dollar, which makes him confident that nothing could possibly go wrong. But when they face the worst rat and roach infestation, their hopes quickly turn to fears.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield
programme.desc: A weekly show on fixed income with the biggest names in the field, covering sovereign and credit markets as investors grapple with fiscal, monetary and financial factors.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

If his secret stays safe, he could quadruple his profit.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 1
programme.desc: Newbies Scott and Chrissy push their way onto Brandon and Lori's turf forcing the couple to burn cash like never before. Then, a set of wrapped pallets heats up the competition, forcing everyone to fight to the finish for what could be nothing morethan hidden garbage. And later, the bidding explodes over a large mystery item. And when the dust settles, two lucky storage warriors unveil the most explosive treasure to date.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 2
programme.desc: Arch-enemies drop their guard to team up against a new threat. Then, it's back to the future when Desert Dan risks all on a tire and a hunch. And later, blades are drawn, fragile alliances crumble, and the buyers let nothing stand in the way of winning big.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 3
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe, so he gambles big on a risky bin. Then, Lori defies her husband Brandon and buys a questionable unit. Will her bold move lead to a dynasty or divorce? And later, lightning erupts when the buyers battle it out for a puzzle of parts they hope will add up to one smooth ride.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 4
programme.desc: Big money brings out fierce competition at a rare high-stakes RV auction. Then, the contents of a locker spill out at our bidders' feet, smashing several dangerous objects. Will it bring seven years of bad luck, or a 7-figure payday? And later, Jesse's experience with antiques makes him think treasures lie behind the iron curtain.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 5
programme.desc: A deadly bin puts all the buyers on edge. It's a bad omen that casts a dark shadow over the day. As the day winds to a fever pitch, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy in a do or die bidding war that sends all strategy out the window. And later, our competitors uncover a high-tech find they think could worth thousands. But all that glitters may not be gold.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S3 6
programme.desc: Cash flies over a locker that reveals a high-ticket mystery item. Then, everyone digs deep to win an ATM, but when the dust settles will this thing be filled with big bucks or major regret? And later, the unlikeliest of duos team up with a strategy that leaves our buyers' heads spinning.

programme.title: Into the Storm
programme.desc: In the span of a single day, the town of Silverton is ravaged by an unprecedented onslaught of tornadoes. The entire town is at the mercy of the erratic and deadly cyclones, even as storm trackers predict the worst is yet to come. Most people seek shelter, while others run towards the vortex, testing how far a storm chaser will go for that once-in-a-lifetime shot. Told through the eyes and lenses of professional storm chasers, thrill-seeking amateurs, and courageous townspeople, "Into the Storm" throws you directly into the eye of the storm to experience Mother Nature at her most extreme.

programme.title: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two sly government agents, one a charmer and the other a master of disguise, are sent to stop an insanely brilliant scientist who plans to assassinate the President of the United States.

programme.title: Pacific Rim
programme.desc: Acclaimed filmmaker Guillermo del Toro (Pan's Labyrinth) brings out the big guns in this sci-fi action epic about a ragtag band of humans that band together in the year 2025 to fight legions of monstrous creatures rising from the sea. Using massive piloted robots to combat the alien threat, earth's survivors (including Charlie Hunnam, Charlie Day & Rinko Kikuchi) take the fight to the invading alien force lurking in the depths of the Pacific Ocean. Nearly defenseless in the face of the relentless enemy, the forces of mankind have no choice but to turn to two unlikely heroes -- a washed up former pilot and an untested trainee -- who now stand as earth's final hope against the mounting apocalypse.

programme.title: Jack the Giant Slayer
programme.desc: Bryan Singer supersizes the "Jack and the Beanstalk" legend in this epic action twist on a classic tale, starring Nicholas Hoult, Stanley Tucci, Bill Nighy, Ewan McGregor, Ian McShane and more. When a young farmhand unwittingly opens a gateway between our world and a fearsome race of giants, an ancient war is reignited. Unleashed upon the Earth, the marauding giants strive to reclaim the land they once lost, forcing Jack into the battle of his life to stop them. Fighting for a kingdom and its people -- and the love of a princess, of course -- he comes face to face with the legendary goliaths and, in the process, become a legend himself.

programme.title: Creepy Pasta
programme.desc: Trapped in an abandoned house, a young man desperately searches for clues about his trapped situation. The unsettling truth actually lies in a sequence of viral videos and they gradually corrupt his mind…

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.desc: In Philippines, occupants of WWII-scarred The Red House experience unexplained disturbances; Thai actress and former Miss Thailand learns that she has a guardian angel, Deva Uma, protecting her.

programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has too much fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: an innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested BFF; a thief absconds with a giant life-size stick figure; and more!

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino

programme.title: Grade 8 Math

programme.title: Grade 8 English

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. Discover how to identify a substance according to its atomic structure, and how to use the periodic table of elements to organize and determine the chemical properties of elements.

programme.title: PTA

programme.title: Grade 6 Filipino

programme.title: Grade 6 Math

programme.title: Cic Tour De LA Provence 2026
programme.desc: It is an unmissable cycling event and a perfect training ground for the Tour de France: the 10th edition of the CIC Tour de La Provence took place from 13 to 15 February 2026. At the start, 16 teams of 7 riders, 542 kilometres in 3 stages between Marseille and Arles.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Capitaine Marleau
programme.desc: After many years without contact, talented blacksmith Florence Rougier crosses paths again with her adoptive brother, Olivier Garcin. When he is found murdered, Marleau looks into their strange family history. Faced with investigators, Florence's relatives remain united and uncooperative.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Les Regles Du Jeu
programme.desc: Lolita does not like to smile. Kevin does not know how to sell himself. Hamid does not like bosses. At 20, without any diploma, they are looking for work. For six months, the coaches from a placement agency will teach them the behaviour and language one must have today to land a job.

programme.title: Les Patins
programme.desc: Mina loves skating. Today, her father, recently divorced from her mother, is accompanying her to her first figure skating lesson...

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu
programme.desc: Raed Hammoud travels to the heart of the Indian Ocean, to a tiny island in the Maldives. In this paradisiacal archipelago, where cricket fans are numerous, he visits the Mahibadhoo stadium, renamed the Pele Stadium. It's a chance to meet supporters who are passionate about football.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu
programme.desc: In northern Argentina, Raed Hammoud discovers the Purmamarca stadium, described by FIFA President Gianni Infantino as ''the most beautiful pitch in the world''. In Buenos Aires, he measures the passion of Argentinians for their favourite?sport and their national heroes, Messi and Maradona.

programme.title: TerrA artistika
programme.desc: This painter and fashion photographer turns his painting into his own cinema. Between abstraction and figuration, Chris Carolina's work reveals a quest for purity, love and sincerity, with the figure of woman placed at the center of his reflections.

programme.title: 64' actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Magazine
programme.desc: Magazine

programme.title: Le Journal De LA RTBF
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: In the Paris region, Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits a ''secret'' flea market and a colorful workshop that revives the art of cement tiles.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Pont-d'Ouilly, the Coing grocery store specializes in organic, local and artisanal products. Meeting a couple who started marketing reusable toothbrushes. In the Caen plain, volunteers have set themselves the mission of saving old apple varieties.

programme.title: Le Journal afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De LA RTS
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Fara
programme.desc: Fara and Koto are two children born with disabilities. Seeing this as a curse, their parents plan to bury them alive to ward it off. Thanks to the kindness of their brothers and sisters, they narrowly escape and embark on a fantastic adventure.

programme.title: C'Est Mathematique ! avec Iman
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: TA Vie Sans ca
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De LA Fontaine
programme.desc: Ox is en-route to losing the tennis final: he's accidentally destroyed all his equipment.

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: TerrA artistika
programme.desc: Glass is their favorite medium. Martine and Jacki Perrin work with four hands and sculpt pieces with original colors and lines, constantly playing with transparency, porosity and above all with light.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'Hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'Instant Roland-Garros
programme.desc: The daily roundup with full results, the best discussions and not-to-be missed highlights.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: Actor Roda Fawaz is cycling through the Avesnois regional nature park, nicknamed the secret garden of the Ch'tis. A green immersion just a stone's throw from the Belgian border.

programme.title: Le Magazine De LA Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Elected best sommelier in Switzerland in 2015, Jerome is the ambassador of Chasselas in the canton of Vaud. Yet he was born far from the vineyards, in Ivory Coast, where he first trained in hospitality. Now settled in the heart of the Leman vineyards, he makes wine a language blending memory and culture.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match
programme.desc: She's a huge star, a legend of French and world athletics. Double world champion, triple Olympic champion, an exceptional record in French sport: Marie-Jose Perec is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: They challenge artistic codes and embody a living, bold and committed art. Richard Orlinski meets Laura Huang Li, a designer with Franco-Chinese influences, who reinvents floral art with a minimalist approach inspired by ikebana. Together, they create a sculpture combining anemones, poppies and hydrangeas, a subtle blend of rigor and spontaneity. Adeline Rappaz is a Swiss high-end ready-to-wear designer, drawing inspiration from urbex, the living and the ephemeral. Her work combines ethics and innovation, through the enhancement of dormant stocks from major French fashion houses, for unique collections.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures
programme.desc: Ken Belanger is a mountain guide and off-piste skiing specialist on Hokkaido, Japan's most northerly island. He welcomes five skiers who have come to live an extraordinary experience in this powder snow paradise. The group climb Mount Asahi, the island's highest peak.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ?
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: Off to Montreal to discover the Musee des Beaux-Arts. Guided by meditation, Mathias Bensimon creates profound and luminous canvases. Haider Ackermann expresses the sensuality and eroticism so dear to Tom Ford, while adding a touch of poetry and gentleness. Sculptor Salome Cousseau shapes wood with passion and elegance.
